bodySnippet: Skip to main content MG WASHCENTRAL Billing Usage & Billing BILLING Usage & Billing Search ⌘K Ask Shyne MG Current Billing Period — May 2026 May 1 – May 31, 2026 · Next invoice: Jun 1, 2026 · ● 17 days remaining $46.18 SMS Usage $33.88 Email Usage 1,847 SMS Sent · 98.1% delivered 42,350 Emails Sent · 99.1% delivered Overview SMS Usage Email Usage Invoices 1 open Rate Card Spending Alerts Rate changes take effect on the next billing period. Contact support to modify platform pricing. PLATFORM SUBSCRIPTION $499 per month · fixed Full access to all WashCentral modules, unlimited users, all locations. Billed on the 1st of each month. Contract rate · read-only SMS — OUTBOUND $0.025 per message sent Applies to all outbound SMS: campaigns, automation triggers, and transactional messages. Failed sends are not billed. Update Rate EMAIL — OUTBOUND $0.0008 per email sent ($0.80 / 1,000) Applies to all outbound emails: campaigns, automation sequences, and transactional emails. Bounced emails are not billed.
